source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHY MOONSHOT AI?

Imagine websites that rebuild themselves on autopilot to sell more, convert better, and grow faster.
At Moonshot AI, we’re making that happen — merging generative AI, large-scale data pipelines, and experimentation into a self-evolving web.

We’re a well-funded, very early-stage startup with a massive vision. Joining now means you’re not just an employee — you’re helping set the technical and cultural DNA of the company. If you’ve ever wanted the autonomy of a founder with the backing of top-tier investors, this is it.




WHAT YOU’LL BUILD & ACHIEVE

As our Senior Fullstack Engineer, you’ll be hands-on across the stack — designing, building, and scaling systems that power our AI-driven platform. Expect autonomy, speed, and a ton of ownership.

 - Architect and build scalable systems — from backend APIs to frontend dashboards — that process tens of millions of web events per day.

 - Design large-scale data infrastructure that explains how websites are built, why they perform the way they do, and how to optimize them.

 - Train and integrate LLMs into production to automatically hypothesize, generate, and validate website variants.

 - Shape engineering culture & practices — your fingerprints will be all over our tech stack, architecture, and team processes.

 - Experiment, prototype, and iterate — research + product + AI + scale, all at once.

This isn’t about maintaining yet another SaaS app — it’s about building an AI engine that redefines how digital products are created.




WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - A software craftsman — you write clean, scalable code and know how to ship at speed.

 - 5+ years fullstack experience (Python, JS, AWS preferred, but not a blocker).

 - Experience leading teams or driving major projects.

 - Background in CS, EE, Math, or equivalent hands-on mastery.

 - An AI enthusiast who wants to build with LLMs and shape how they’re applied in the real world.


BONUS POINTS:

 - Startup experience (you thrive in zero-to-one).

 - Experience training or deploying ML models in production.




AT MOONSHOT, CULTURE ISN’T FLUFF — IT’S HOW WE WIN

 - Curiosity & Growth → We challenge assumptions, ask big questions, and push for mastery.

 - Low Ego → No ivory towers — everyone gets their hands dirty.

 - Ownership → You own outcomes, not just outputs. Shipping is step one; impact is the goal.

 - Trust → Radical transparency and accountability, even when it’s hard.

 - Agility → We move fast, test faster, and aren’t afraid to pivot.

 - This Is Your Company → Ideas fuel breakthroughs. We’re all builders here.

 - Enjoy the Ride → Startups are a rollercoaster — we create good vibes and celebrate wins together.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive compensation

 - Meaningful equity — real ownership in Moonshot AI’s success.

 - Full health coverage (medical, dental, vision) for you + your family.

 - Unlimited PTO — we trust you to take the time you need.

 - Tax free commuter and parking benefits

 - Office-first culture (4 days/week) — Midtown Manhattan, in the middle of it all.

 - Work directly with the founding team — your impact is immediate, visible, and career-defining.

 - Free One Medical Membership

 - 401k

source_jobs.title: Senior Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
WHY MOONSHOT AI?

Imagine websites that rebuild themselves on autopilot to sell more, convert better, and grow faster.
At Moonshot AI, we’re making that happen — merging generative AI, large-scale data pipelines, and experimentation into a self-evolving web.

We’re a well-funded, very early-stage startup with a massive vision. Joining now means you’re not just an employee — you’re helping set the technical and cultural DNA of the company. If you’ve ever wanted the autonomy of a founder with the backing of top-tier investors, this is it.



The Role
We don’t hire traditional salespeople. We hire entrepreneurial sellers who act like co-founders in their territories. As a Senior Account Executive, you’ll engage directly with high-value eCommerce brands, solve complex challenges, and guide customers to realize the full potential of Moonshot AI. You’ll leverage these experiences to inform product development, refine processes, and build repeatable GTM strategies.

What You’ll Do

 - Own & Drive Revenue: Manage the full sales cycle from prospecting to close. Your deals will have high impact, often in the seven-figure range.
   

 - Experiment & Build: Work with customers to understand their challenges, prototype creative solutions, and feed insights back to product and marketing teams.
   

 - Be a Trusted Advisor: Translate complex business problems into Moonshot AI solutions. Partner with Customer Success to ensure long-term value.
   

 - Shape GTM & Playbooks: Help refine our ICP, messaging, and sales processes. Bring market insights and ideas that will directly influence strategy and product.
   

 - Learn & Iterate: Every engagement is an opportunity to test hypotheses, uncover new features, and improve the Moonshot AI experience for every customer.
   

Who You Are

 - Experienced & Entrepreneurial: 4–7+ years in SaaS or MarTech sales, ideally with experience in eCommerce or digital-first companies.
   

 - Strategic & Resourceful: Skilled at multi-threaded, consultative sales cycles and building business cases that clearly articulate ROI.
   

 - Founder-Minded: Excited to build playbooks, processes, and strategies, not just follow them.
   

 - Relationship-Oriented: Able to build trust quickly with executives and technical stakeholders alike.
   

 - Tech-Savvy: Comfortable discussing AI, automation, and data workflows in real-world business terms.
   

 - Ownership-Driven: Low ego, high accountability, thrives in a fast-moving, collaborative environment.
   

Why Join Moonshot AI?

 - Founding GTM Hire: Directly shape how we sell, who we sell to, and the overall strategy from day one.
   

 - High-Impact Work: Sell a category-defining AI product that creates measurable, immediate value.
   

 - Fast-Growing Startup: Be part of a scaling company with the resources to succeed and the freedom to experiment.
   

Career Acceleration: High performers can quickly move into leadership or enterprise-focused roles.




AT MOONSHOT, CULTURE ISN’T FLUFF — IT’S HOW WE WIN

 - Curiosity & Growth → We challenge assumptions, ask big questions, and push for mastery.

 - Low Ego → No ivory towers — everyone gets their hands dirty.

 - Ownership → You own outcomes, not just outputs. Shipping is step one; impact is the goal.

 - Trust → Radical transparency and accountability, even when it’s hard.

 - Agility → We move fast, test faster, and aren’t afraid to pivot.

 - This Is Your Company → Ideas fuel breakthroughs. We’re all builders here.

 - Enjoy the Ride → Startups are a rollercoaster — we create good vibes and celebrate wins together.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive compensation

 - Meaningful equity — real ownership in Moonshot AI’s success.

 - Full health coverage (medical, dental, vision) for you + your family.

 - Unlimited PTO — we trust you to take the time you need.

 - Tax free commuter and parking benefits

 - Office-first culture (4 days/week) — Midtown Manhattan, in the middle of it all.

 - Work directly with the found

source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative (BDR)
source_jobs.description:
WHY MOONSHOT AI?

Imagine websites that rebuild themselves on autopilot to sell more, convert better, and grow faster.
At Moonshot AI, we’re making that happen — merging generative AI, large-scale data pipelines, and experimentation into a self-evolving web.

We’re a well-funded, very early-stage startup with a massive vision. Joining now means you’re not just an employee — you’re helping set the technical and cultural DNA of the company. If you’ve ever wanted the autonomy of a founder with the backing of top-tier investors, this is it.



The Role
We don’t hire traditional BDRs. We hire founder-minded growth builders who thrive on experimentation and creating impact. As one of the first U.S. BDRs, you’ll own outbound prospecting, generate high-quality opportunities, and help define how Moonshot AI connects with customers. You’ll work closely with founders and AEs, learning the platform inside and out while shaping the GTM playbook from day one.

What You’ll Do

 - Build Pipeline Like a Founder: Research, identify, and target high-potential eCommerce brands. Run outbound campaigns across email, LinkedIn, and calls.
   

 - Create Opportunities: Craft outreach that resonates, booking qualified meetings for AEs and leadership.
   

 - Collaborate Across Teams: Work with sales, marketing, and product to refine messaging, test channels, and share market insights.
   

 - Be the Face of Moonshot AI: Represent a category-defining AI platform to senior marketers, founders, and growth leaders at top brands.
   

 - Learn & Iterate: Use every outreach as an opportunity to test, improve, and optimize how we approach the market.
   

Who You Are

 - Experienced & Ambitious: 6 months – 2 years in Sales Development or Business Development (SaaS, eCommerce, MarTech preferred).
   

 - Communicator: Clear, confident, and persuasive over email, LinkedIn, and phone.
   

 - Curious & Coachable: Hungry to learn, motivated to improve, and thrives on feedback.
   

 - Resilient & Resourceful: Outbound is tough - you embrace rejection, iterate, and push forward.
   

 - Startup-Ready: Comfortable in a fast-moving, zero-ego environment where you take ownership and move fast.
   

Why Join Moonshot AI?

 - Ground-Floor Impact: Be one of the earliest U.S. GTM hires, shaping our outbound motion and playbooks.
   

 - Learn From Founders: Direct exposure to founders and AEs, accelerating your growth and sales skills.
   

 - Category-Defining Product: Sell a platform that changes how digital products operate and evolve.
   

 - Fast Growth Path: High performers can quickly advance into AE roles with significant upside.
   

High-Earner Potential: Competitive bonus and extra commission for over-achievers.




AT MOONSHOT, CULTURE ISN’T FLUFF — IT’S HOW WE WIN

 - Curiosity & Growth → We challenge assumptions, ask big questions, and push for mastery.

 - Low Ego → No ivory towers — everyone gets their hands dirty.

 - Ownership → You own outcomes, not just outputs. Shipping is step one; impact is the goal.

 - Trust → Radical transparency and accountability, even when it’s hard.

 - Agility → We move fast, test faster, and aren’t afraid to pivot.

 - This Is Your Company → Ideas fuel breakthroughs. We’re all builders here.

 - Enjoy the Ride → Startups are a rollercoaster — we create good vibes and celebrate wins together.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive compensation

 - Meaningful equity — real ownership in Moonshot AI’s success.

 - Full health coverage (medical, dental, vision) for you + your family.

 - Unlimited PTO — we trust you to take the time you need.

 - Tax free commuter and parking benefits

 - Office-first culture (4 days/week) — Midtown Manhattan, in the middle of it all.

source_jobs.title: Sr. Conversion Rate Optimization Strategist
source_jobs.description:
WHY MOONSHOT AI?

Imagine websites that rebuild themselves on autopilot to sell more, convert better, and grow faster.
At Moonshot AI, we’re making that happen — merging generative AI, large-scale data pipelines, and experimentation into a self-evolving web.

We’re a well-funded, very early-stage startup with a massive vision. Joining now means you’re not just an employee — you’re helping set the technical and cultural DNA of the company. If you’ve ever wanted the autonomy of a founder with the backing of top-tier investors, this is it.




THE ROLE

We're seeking a customer facing, data-driven Sr. CRO Strategist with 4–6 years of experience to lead conversion rate optimization initiatives for a portfolio of direct-to-consumer (DTC) e-commerce clients. This is a customer-facing, agency-style role where you will manage multiple customer, owning both strategy and execution of high-impact experimentation programs with a strong emphasis on A/B testing, while acting as a trusted advisor.

You will translate complex data into clear, compelling narratives, build client-ready decks, and communicate insights effectively to stakeholders across different levels.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Lead CRO strategy and execution for multiple DTC e-commerce accounts, from audits and roadmaps to A/B testing and reporting

 - Design and implement experimentation programs including A/B and multivariate testing, analyzing user behavior to identify optimization opportunities

 - Establish KPIs and create testing roadmaps for advertising (campaigns, landing pages) and websites (UX, checkout, conversion flows)

 - Own client relationships end-to-end, serving as the primary strategic partner,, providing expert guidance on CRO methodologies and communicating results clearly to stakeholders

 - Build and maintain a strong testing pipeline that continuously answers the needs of clients and their customers

 - Pull, analyze, and synthesize performance data to generate actionable insights

 - Develop and deliver presentations, reports, and decks that translate data into clear business recommendations for diverse audiences (marketing, product, executive teams)

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with internal teams (media, creative, analytics) to ensure cohesive strategy and execution
   
   


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - 5-7+ years experience as a product manager, UI/UX designer, CRO Strategist or data analyst, preferably at a DTC brand or client facing agency

 - Proven experience managing multiple clients or projects simultaneously in a fast-paced environment

 - Strong analytical skills with ability to identify friction points, translate data into actionable insights, and make sound recommendations

 - Deep experience with A/B testing and experimentation methodologies, including test design and analysis

 - Knowledge of e-commerce best practices, consumer psychology, and UX/UI principles that drive conversions

 - Experience with data storytelling, deck-building, and presenting insights to stakeholders at multiple levels

 - Results-oriented problem-solver who thrives in fast-paced, client-facing environments and uses testing (including failed tests) as learning opportunities

 - Strong communication and relationship management skills, with the ability to build trust and influence client decisions
   
   


WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

 - Effectively manage multiple DTC e-commerce accounts while maintaining high-quality communication and delivery

 - Achieve strong client experience metrics including high satisfaction (NPS/CSAT), clear communication, and proactive expectation management

 - Build client trust that drives long term partnerships, renewals and expansion opportunities

 - Deliver measurable improvements in conversion rates, revenue, and key KPIs through a consistent, high-quality experimentation program

 - Provide clear, insight-driven reporting and storytelling that enables clients to make confident business decisions

 - Successfully balance multiple clien

source_jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHY MOONSHOT AI?

Imagine websites that rebuild themselves on autopilot to sell more, convert better, and grow faster.
At Moonshot AI, we’re making that happen — merging generative AI, large-scale data pipelines, and experimentation into a self-evolving web.

We’re a well-funded, very early-stage startup with a massive vision. Joining now means you’re not just an employee — you’re helping set the technical and cultural DNA of the company. If you’ve ever wanted the autonomy of a founder with the backing of top-tier investors, this is it.




WHAT YOU’LL BUILD & LEAD

As our Staff Software Engineer, you’ll be the technical backbone behind Moonshot’s evolution engine - designing scalable systems, guiding engineering strategy, and mentoring the builders around you.
You’ll balance hands-on depth with architectural altitude, turning vision into technical reality.

You will:

 - Work at the forefront of generative AI and agentic flows - build systems that let AI autonomously reason, experiment, and deploy real changes to the web.

 - Architect the next generation of Moonshot’s experiment engine - scalable, observable, fault-tolerant, built for millions of daily events.

 - Design and evolve our backend infrastructure across Python (Flask-RestX), serverless AWS, and data pipelines (ClickHouse, Postgres, Kinesis, Firehose, S3).

 - Drive technical strategy - define our engineering principles, evolve architecture across microservices, ingestion, and LLM-driven systems.

 - Mentor and multiply - uplevel senior and mid-level engineers through code reviews, pairing, and design docs.

 - Collaborate cross-functionally - work with AI, product, and data science to translate business needs into resilient systems.

 - Prototype and push boundaries - bring ideas from concept to production fast, balancing experimentation and rigor.

 - Raise the bar on performance, security, and reliability as we scale toward SOC 2 and enterprise clients.

This isn’t a people-management role - it’s technical leadership at its purest form: deep design, high leverage, and full ownership.




WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 8+ years of experience designing and shipping production systems at scale (bonus: 0→1 or startup environment).

 - Strong expertise in Python, AWS, and JavaScript - you’re comfortable owning both backend and frontend architecture.

 - Proven ability to design distributed systems (event-driven, microservices, or data-heavy architectures).

 - You’ve been a technical lead or staff engineer - mentoring peers, reviewing designs, and setting engineering standards.

 - Bias toward action and clarity - you simplify, document, and deliver.

 - Deep curiosity about AI and experimentation - you love systems that learn and adapt.

 - Bonus: experience with ClickHouse, LLMs in production, or ecommerce/analytics infrastructure.




AT MOONSHOT, CULTURE ISN’T FLUFF — IT’S HOW WE WIN

 - Curiosity & Growth → We challenge assumptions, ask big questions, and push for mastery.

 - Low Ego → No ivory towers — everyone gets their hands dirty.

 - Ownership → You own outcomes, not just outputs. Shipping is step one; impact is the goal.

 - Trust → Radical transparency and accountability, even when it’s hard.

 - Agility → We move fast, test faster, and aren’t afraid to pivot.

 - This Is Your Company → Ideas fuel breakthroughs. We’re all builders here.

 - Enjoy the Ride → Startups are a rollercoaster — we create good vibes and celebrate wins together.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive compensation

 - Meaningful equity — real ownership in Moonshot AI’s success.

 - Full health coverage (medical, dental, vision) for you + your family.

 - Unlimited PTO — we trust you to take the time you need.

 - Tax free commuter and parking benefits

 - Office-first culture (4 days/week) — Midtown Manhattan, in the middle of it all.

 - Work directly with the founding team — your impact is immediate, visible, and career-defining.

 - Free One Medical Membership

 - 401k

source_jobs.title: Head of Marketing
source_jobs.description:
WHY MOONSHOT AI?

Imagine websites that rebuild themselves on autopilot to sell more, convert better, and grow faster.
At Moonshot AI, we’re making that happen — merging generative AI, large-scale data pipelines, and experimentation into a self-evolving web.

We’re a well-funded, very early-stage startup with a massive vision. Joining now means you’re not just an employee — you’re helping set the technical and cultural DNA of the company. If you’ve ever wanted the autonomy of a founder with the backing of top-tier investors, this is it.



Moonshot AI is looking for a Head of Marketing to own the strategic layer end-to-end while leading and developing a growing team. You'll set the direction, build the playbook, and work closely with the Marketing Manager to translate strategy into campaigns and content that drive pipelines.




WHAT YOU’LL OWN


STRATEGY & POSITIONING

 - Own Moonshot's marketing strategy end-to-end. Positioning, messaging, brand, demand, and growth.

 - Shape and evolve our brand voice so we stand out in a crowded AI and eCommerce landscape.

 - Build and own a proactive GTM calendar

 - Define the GTM narrative and keep sales, customer success, and product aligned around it.

 - Decide where and how we show up at conferences and industry events, and turn presence into pipeline.


TEAM LEADERSHIP

 - Directly manage a Marketing Manager, setting clear goals, priorities, and a strategic framework

 - Build a roadmap and prioritization layer needed to scale

 - Mentor and develop a direct report


EXECUTION & OWNERSHIP

 - Build and run a content engine that turns ideas, customer wins, and insights into momentum.

 - Own demand generation across paid ads, performance marketing, funnels, and experimentation.

 - Operate at the intersection of strategy and tactical day to day execution


WHO YOU ARE

You're a full-stack marketer and people leader equally comfortable setting strategy, executing hands-on, and developing others.

 - 7+ years of marketing experience, including leadership in a high-growth startup (SaaS, B2B, or eCommerce tools strongly preferred.

Experienced leader in a growing marketing function that can introduce strategic roadmaps, prioritization frameworks, and a proactive GTM calendar

 - Proven ability to manage and develop individual contributors, not just direct work but grow people.

 - Deep understanding of content, branding, performance marketing, and demand generation.

 - Strong intuition for positioning and messaging - you know how to make complex products simple and compelling.

 - Hands-on experience with paid channels (Google, Meta, LinkedIn, etc.) and performance optimization.

 - Comfortable owning real numbers - pipeline, CAC, conversion rates, not just awareness metrics.

 - Builder mindset: strategic when needed, scrappy when it counts.

 - Clear communicator who can align founders, GTM teams, and marketers around a single narrative.


WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

 - Moonshot is clearly positioned as a leader in AI-powered experimentation and growth.

 - Marketing becomes a predictable, scalable driver of pipeline and revenue.

 - The marketing team operates with clarity, speed, and high ownership.

 - Content, campaigns, and events consistently create real conversations and opportunities.




AT MOONSHOT, CULTURE ISN’T FLUFF — IT’S HOW WE WIN

 - Curiosity & Growth → We challenge assumptions, ask big questions, and push for mastery.

 - Low Ego → No ivory towers — everyone gets their hands dirty.

 - Ownership → You own outcomes, not just outputs. Shipping is step one; impact is the goal.

 - Trust → Radical transparency and accountability, even when it’s hard.

 - Agility → We move fast, test faster, and aren’t afraid to pivot.

 - This Is Your Company → Ideas fuel breakthroughs. We’re all builders here.

 - Enjoy the Ride → Startups are a rollercoaster — we create good vibes and celebrate wins together.

 - Competitive compensation
